case_title: KIRCHER, VINCENT vs. SHUMAN, MATHEW et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT SHUMAN, MATHEW SHUMAN, SHIRLEY ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHUMAN, MATHEW SHUMAN, SHIRLEY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 445 O'FARRELL ST. #212, S.F. $1,092.17 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,092.17, STAYED UNTIL APR-18-2000, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS PER COST BILL. IN THE EVENT DEFTS VACATE THE PREMISES AND TURN IN THE KEYS TO THE HOTEL MGR BY 12:00 NOON ON 04/18/00 OR PAYS ALL OF THE RENT, PLTF WILL VACATE THE JUDGMENT AND DISMISS.
